definition: Semiconductor and AI hardware supply chains face a compound effective cost increase of 23-40% from the combination of tariffs (15-25%), rerouting costs (5-10%), and compliance overhead (3-5%), calculated from statutory inputs. This compounds with export control restrictions.
evidence: 23-40% total effective cost from statutory inputs
open_questions: Whether supply chain reorganization could reduce the rerouting component over time
Impact of potential tariff escalation scenarios
